title: Fyxe's PBR Addons
description: A PBR Extension for various mod blocks and items that includes Normal and Specular maps for LabPBR shaders.
body:
# WELCOME!
This is a PBR pack which adds normal maps and specular textures for mods that do not have them. Meant to emulate the style of [Embrace Pixels](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/embrace-pixels), I would not use this resource pack without it. 

**NOTE:** this diverges from Embrace Pixels in that it gives more normal maps and specular textures to items as well as blocks. 

Reminder that you will need a shaderpack that supports LabPBR to see any differences. My reccommendded is [AstraLex](https://modrinth.com/shader/astralex). (That is what the images in the Gallery are using.)

![FPBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b5d22665a7daca9b39f4d4bc13b5c9ec4227d87.png)

Keep in mind this is still a WIP. Some textures are placeholder and some issues are still being ironed out. 

Includes normal maps and specular maps for the following blocks and items:
### Update 0.3.0
- [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Macaw's Trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-trapdoors)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Macaw's Paths and Pavings](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-paths-and-pavings)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-lights-and-lamps)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Macaw's Holidays](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-holidays)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Simple Trashcan](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-trashcan)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
- [Simple Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-radio)
  - Added normal maps for blocks
### Update 0.2.0
- Base Minecraft
  - Some Entities, Boats and chest boats
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
  - Added normal maps for armor
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
  - Some entities and boats
- [Dark Waters](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-waters)
  - Normal maps for entities
- [Simple Copper Armor and Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-armor-and-tools)
  - Added normal and specular maps for items and armor
- [Fetzi's Displays](https://modrinth.com/mod/fetzis-displays)
  - Added normal maps
- [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones)
  - Added normal maps
- [More Tide Anglers Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-tide-anglers-variants)
  - Added normal maps 
- [Simple hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hats)
  - Added normal maps
- [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)
  - Added normal maps
- [Tough as Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)
  - Added normal maps to armors
### Update 0.1.9
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
  - Adds a decent amount of normal and specular for blocks but not all. 
  - Also modifies the tools to be vanilla shaped. Can remove if you dislike.
- [Compat Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/compat-delight)
- [Crate Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crate-delight)
  - Normal maps for all crates
- [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)
  - Normal maps for all crates and blocks
- [Oceans Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight)
  - Normal maps for guardian soup block
- [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight)
  - Normal maps for all crates and blocks
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight)
  - Normal maps for all blocks and bucket
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)
  - Normal maps for all blocks and bucket
- [The Joy of Painting (xercapaint)](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)
  - Normal and specular maps added for easel and empty canvas.
### Update 0.1.8
- Base Minecraft
  - A ton of items including all tools, ores, etc.
- [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)
  - The bounty board block
- [Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk)
  - All chalk items
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
  - Modifies the Light Station
- [Extractinator](https://modrinth.com/mod/extractinator)
  - The extractinator and blocks
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
  - All blocks
  - Knives
- [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves)
  - Includes all the wall displays
  - Normal Maps for all buckets
- [Hardcore Torches](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-torches)
  - All torches
  - All Lanterns
  - Animal Fat
  - Oil Can
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
  - The aircraft 
- [inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
  - All backpack items
- [inmisaddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmisaddon)
  - All backpack entities
- [Magic Mirror](https://modrinth.com/mod/qds-magic-mirror)
  - All mirror items
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
  - Animal Crate
  - Froglass
  - All shellstone variants
  - Teddy bear
  - Buckets
- [Sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill)
  - The sawmill block
- [Variant Vanilla Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/variant-vanilla-blocks)
  - Every block and entity
- [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)
  - Easel

## NOTE
This Resource Pack was made to be used with [my modpack.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fyxes-vanilla-modpack) So I am only initially working on adding blocks from mods within the pack. I may branch out to other mods later if I have the time. 
- Also, you have my permission to use this resource pack in your modpacks.
- This does not contain any textures from the mods themselves.
- If you have any feedback please send to fyxeincfeedback@gmail.com
